text.title: Objection Bank Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Objection Bank.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, 12 sales calls + 80 outreach replies in last 30 days.
example.trace: harvest (28 raw objections) → cluster (9 unique) → templates (≤150 words each, 5 evidence-anchored) → top-3 promoted to FAQ + landing within 7 days → weekly review booked
